description: USPTO-certified American Coin® (AC) emerged in 2021 on BSC as a green utility token designed for global payments and education use cases, later upgraded to Version 3.0. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 AC gives all AC holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: American Coin
